mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dahua_device_channel_cache ( id, device_code, unit_type, unit_seq, channel_seq, channel_code, channel_sn, channel_name, channel_type, camera_type, owner_code, gps_x, gps_y, gps_z, map_id, domain_id, memo, is_online, stat, sleep_stat, access_s, capability, ch_ext, is_virtual, device_category, device_type ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{deviceCode}, #{unitType}, #{unitSeq}, #{channelSeq}, #{channelCode}, #{channelSn}, #{channelName}, #{channelType}, #{cameraType}, #{ownerCode}, #{gpsX}, #{gpsY}, #{gpsZ}, #{mapId}, #{domainId}, #{memo}, #{isOnline}, #{stat}, #{sleepStat}, #{accessS}, #{capability}, #{chExt}, #{isVirtual}, #{deviceCategory}, #{deviceType} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE device_code = VALUES(device_code), unit_type = VALUES(unit_type), unit_seq = VALUES(unit_seq), channel_seq = VALUES(channel_seq), channel_code = VALUES(channel_code), channel_sn = VALUES(channel_sn), channel_name = VALUES(channel_name), channel_type = VALUES(channel_type), camera_type = VALUES(camera_type), owner_code = VALUES(owner_code), gps_x = VALUES(gps_x), gps_y = VALUES(gps_y), gps_z = VALUES(gps_z), map_id = VALUES(map_id), domain_id = VALUES(domain_id), memo = VALUES(memo), is_online = VALUES(is_online), stat = VALUES(stat), sleep_stat = VALUES(sleep_stat), access_s = VALUES(access_s), capability = VALUES(capability), ch_ext = VALUES(ch_ext), is_virtual = VALUES(is_virtual), device_category = VALUES(device_category), device_type = VALUES(device_type)
mapper.select:
SELECT d.id, d.device_code AS deviceCode, d.unit_type AS unitType, d.unit_seq AS unitSeq, d.channel_seq AS channelSeq, d.channel_code AS channelCode, d.channel_sn AS channelSn, d.channel_name AS channelName, d.channel_type AS channelType, d.camera_type AS cameraType, d.owner_code AS ownerCode, d.gps_x AS gpsX, d.gps_y AS gpsY, d.gps_z AS gpsZ, d.map_id AS mapId, d.domain_id AS domainId, d.memo, d.is_online AS isOnline, d.stat, d.sleep_stat AS sleepStat, d.access_s AS accessS, d.capability, d.ch_ext AS chExt, d.is_virtual AS isVirtual, d.device_category AS deviceCategory, d.device_type AS deviceType, d.remark_category_id AS remarkCategoryId, rc.name AS remarkCategoryName, DATE_FORMAT(d.updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS updatedAt FROM dahua_device_channel_cache d LEFT JOIN dahua_device_channel_remark_category rc ON d.remark_category_id = rc.id
ORDER BY d.updated_at DESC, d.id DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT DISTINCT channel_type FROM dahua_device_channel_cache WHERE channel_type IS NOT NULL AND channel_type != '' ORDER BY channel_type
SELECT DISTINCT owner_code FROM dahua_device_channel_cache WHERE owner_code IS NOT NULL AND owner_code != '' ORDER BY owner_code
SELECT DISTINCT unit_type FROM dahua_device_channel_cache WHERE unit_type IS NOT NULL ORDER BY unit_type
SELECT COALESCE(channel_type, '') AS bucketKey, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM dahua_device_channel_cache GROUP BY channel_type ORDER BY cnt DESC
SELECT COALESCE(owner_code, '') AS bucketKey, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM dahua_device_channel_cache GROUP BY owner_code ORDER BY cnt DESC
SELECT CAST(unit_type AS CHAR) AS bucketKey, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM dahua_device_channel_cache WHERE unit_type IS NOT NULL GROUP BY unit_type ORDER BY cnt DESC

SELECT channel_code AS channelCode, channel_name AS channelName FROM dahua_device_channel_cache WHERE channel_code IN
#{c}
